name: Switch
purpose: Binary on/off toggle for settings such as live refresh, provenance display, or feature flags.

structures.name: Standalone Switch
structures.notes: On state fills the track with the primary token; thumb slides without bounce.

structures.name: Labeled Row
structures.notes: Label leads, switch trails; whole row is the hit target.

structures.name: Setting Row
structures.notes: Adds a muted description line for settings panels.

interactionNotes: Off track uses a muted surface; on track uses the primary token, not a gradient.
Disabled states keep the same colors at reduced opacity for predictability.
